## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Verification
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration/smoke checks pass
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed)

## Breaking Change Checklist
- [ ] This PR does not introduce a breaking change
- [ ] If breaking: migration notes added
- [ ] If breaking: API contract docs updated
- [ ] If breaking: changelog entry added
